tagline: Over 20 Years of Excellence, Right Here in Dallas!
address: 6725 Hillcrest Ave Ste. B&C, Dallas, TX 75205

teamMembers.name: Aaron Jones, DDS
teamMembers.title: Cosmetic, Family & General Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Born and raised in Irving, Texas, Dr. Aaron Jones earned his DDS from Baylor College of Dentistry and has cared for Park Cities and Dallas families for over two decades.

teamMembers.name: Elizabeth Warsop, DMD
teamMembers.title: General & Cosmetic Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Dr. Warsop blends artistry and advanced training to help patients leave each visit smiling with more confidence and comfort.

teamMembers.name: Justin Cortina, DDS, MS
teamMembers.title: Prosthodontics & Restorative Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Dr. Cortina combines restorative and implant-focused expertise with a conservative, patient-centered treatment approach.

testimonials.author: Verified Patient
testimonials.text: Highland Park Dental is truly a gem amongst dusty stones. The team is thoughtful, friendly, professional, and delivers the most incredible patient experience.

testimonials.author: Longtime Family Patient
testimonials.text: My family has been going to Highland Park Dental for almost 20 years. They are always friendly and professional while making you feel comfortable and well cared for.

rawPageText: Highland Park Dental in Snyder Plaza serves Dallas and Highland Park families with cosmetic, restorative, family, pediatric, and preventive dentistry. The practice highlights over 20 years of excellence, concierge-style service, and a membership plan for patients without insurance. Core services include Invisalign, Zoom whitening, implants, crowns, exams, cleanings, and emergency care. Copy from the site emphasizes high-quality, personalized care and making patients feel comfortable and confident. Contact details repeated across key pages: 6725 Hillcrest Ave Ste. B&C, Dallas, TX 75205, phone 972-362-2021, email HPD@HPDentist.com, office hours Monday 8am-7pm, Tuesday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-2pm. Team pages feature Aaron Jones DDS, Elizabeth Warsop DMD, and Justin Cortina DDS MS. Patient quotes stress trust, friendliness, professionalism, and long-term loyalty.
